name: Green Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 Cups Green Tomatoes, sliced (4 large tomatoes or about 3 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 4 large tomatoes or about 3 pounds to make 8 cups of sliced green tomatoes.
2. If making homemade pie crust, freeze the crust before filling with tomato mixture.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet, add onions and garlic. Sauté until tender, about 3-5 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and cook over medium-high heat until soft, about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Sprinkle parsley, flour, salt, and black pepper over the tomato mixture. Stir until well combined.
6. Allow to cool before spreading into the frozen, unbaked pie shell.
7. Sprinkle cheese evenly on top of the filling.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until browned.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
